name: Yokohama Union Church
description: A historic international and interdenominational church serving the Yokohama community since the Meiji era. It offers services in English and maintains a diverse, multicultural congregation.
mission_statement: To be a lighthouse of God's love in Yokohama.

name: Japan Holiness Church
description: A central hub of the Holiness movement in Japan, known for its emphasis on sanctification and evangelism. The church has played a key role in the history of Japanese Protestantism.

name: Spirit of Jesus Church
description: An indigenous Japanese Pentecostal church with a unique liturgical style and a strong focus on the work of the Holy Spirit. It has branches across Japan and overseas.
mission_statement: Witnessing the power of Jesus to the ends of the earth.

name: Himonya Catholic Church
description: Also known as the Salesian Church, this is one of the most beautiful Catholic buildings in Tokyo, famous for its mosaics and bells. It serves a large, active local parish.
mission_statement: Education and faith in the spirit of Don Bosco.

name: Suginami Church
description: A prominent United Church of Christ in Japan (UCCJ) congregation with a strong history of social justice and musical excellence. It is deeply rooted in the Suginami residential community.
mission_statement: Rooted in Christ, reaching the neighborhood.

name: Kobe International Church
description: An evangelical international church in Kobe city center providing a home for expatriates and globally-minded Japanese. Services are conducted in English with Japanese translation.
mission_statement: Loving God, Loving People, Serving the World.

name: Kyoto International Community Church
description: A multicultural church located near Kyoto University, attracting a diverse mix of students, academics, and families. It emphasizes biblical teaching and international fellowship.
mission_statement: One body in Christ in the heart of Kyoto.

name: Sapporo International Christian Assembly
description: A dynamic Assemblies of God church in Hokkaido with a heart for the international community. It is known for its contemporary worship and active student ministry.
mission_statement: To make disciples of all nations in Sapporo.

name: Nagoya Baptist Church
description: The primary Baptist congregation in Nagoya city, offering traditional worship and a strong educational program. It serves as a regional hub for the Baptist Convention in Japan.
mission_statement: Growing together in the grace of Christ.
